title: Scheduler Integration — Share-of-Voice Multiplier (Shape A)
summary: Add a second scheduler signal: a Share-of-Voice multiplier that blends with the existing turnover multiplier. Low SoV → shorter interval (publish more); high SoV → longer interval (slow down). Additive on top of the existing pipeline — does not replace the turnover factor.
risk: MEDIUM — touches the live scheduler execution path. Clamp bounds and unit tests are mandatory before merge.

in: New pure function shareOfVoiceMultiplierFromSoV(sovPercent: number): number in trendInsights.ts
New pure function computeShareOfVoice(logs, windowDays, ourAuthorSubstring): number in trendInsights.ts
TrendInsightsPayload extended with sovPercent and sovFactor fields
buildTrendInsightsPayload updated to accept ourAuthorSubstring option and compute both fields
server.ts recalcTrendFactor: blend trendFactor × sovFactor, clamp to combined bounds
GET /api/trend-insights response includes sovPercent and sovFactor
Unit tests for shareOfVoiceMultiplierFromSoV and computeShareOfVoice in tests/unit/trendInsights.test.ts
out: UI changes to expose sovFactor (deferred to sprint 2)
Any changes to the gap threshold or runtimeControls.ts

sov_computation.definition: Average percentage of board posts that are ours across snapshots in the window
sov_computation.algorithm: For each snapshot in the window with at least 1 post: compute (our_posts / total_posts) × 100. Return the arithmetic mean across all such snapshots. If no valid snapshots, return 0.
sov_computation.ourAuthorSubstring_source: Passed from server.ts; read from ENV.OUR_AUTHOR_SUBSTRING (new optional env var, default 'shareplan')
sov_computation.fallback: SoV = 0 when no snapshots in window → sovFactor = 1.0 (neutral)

blending.note: Each factor is individually valid (trendFactor already clamped to [0.65, 1.6] by TREND_MULTIPLIER_MIN/MAX). The product clamp prevents extreme compounding.

scheduler_integration.change: After computing trendFactor via trendMultiplierFromAvgRate, also call computeShareOfVoice + shareOfVoiceMultiplierFromSoV, then store clamp(trendFactor × sovFactor, 0.5, 2.0) as the cached trendFactor.
scheduler_integration.cache_key: Existing lastTrendRecalculatedAt / trendRecalibrationDays — both factors recomputed on the same schedule. No separate recalibration timer.
scheduler_integration.fallback: If computeShareOfVoice throws, log warning and use sovFactor = 1.0 (degrade gracefully to existing behaviour).

new_fields.name: sovFactor
new_fields.description: Scheduler multiplier derived from sovPercent (0.75, 1.0, or 1.20)

payload_changes.buildTrendInsightsPayload_signature_chan: Add ourAuthorSubstring: string = 'shareplan' to options object

OUR_AUTHOR_SUBSTRING.effect: Substring match used to identify our posts in board snapshots

acceptance: All existing unit tests still pass
New trendInsights.test.ts cases pass for shareOfVoiceMultiplierFromSoV and computeShareOfVoice
GET /api/trend-insights response includes sovPercent and sovFactor fields
If OUR_AUTHOR_SUBSTRING env var absent, defaults to 'shareplan' — existing behaviour preserved
No new API endpoints or files beyond tests/unit/trendInsights.test.ts
